headline: Amgen Eyes 2026 ‘Springboard’ as Growth Drugs Offset Patent Pressure
summary: Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) executives said the company’s first-quarter performance supports its view that 2026 can serve as a “springboard year,” with growth products helping offset increased competition for the denosumab franchise and other losses of exclusivity. headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Amgen (AMGN) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run?
summary: Investors may be asking whether Amgen's share price still offers value at current levels, or if most of the opportunity is already reflected in the price. Amgen's stock last closed at US$345.73, with returns of 5.3% over 7 days, 4.2% over 30 days, 5.5% year to date, 21.4% over 1 year, 70.8% over 3 years, and 68.7% over 5 years. Recent attention on Amgen has focused on its position in large cap biotechnology and how market participants are evaluating the balance between its growth prospects...

headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks with Competitive Advantages and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: EVERSANA Strengthens Commitment to Driving Market Access Growth with Addition of Industry Expert Jen Norton
summary: EVERSANA®, a leading global provider of commercial services to the life sciences industry, today announced the expansion of its already leading market access offering with the appointment of Jen Norton as President, Market Access & Value. In this new role, Norton will lead the development of a dedicated, technology-first fully integrated market access business unit, uniting EVERSANA's comprehensive services to help clients navigate the complex global pricing and access landscape.

headline: Antag Therapeutics Elects Keith Leonard as Chairman of its Board of Directors
summary: Antag Therapeutics Elects Keith Leonard as Chairman of its Board of Directors Copenhagen, Denmark, 09 June 2026 – Antag Therapeutics (“Antag” or “the Company”), advancing personalized and flexible obesity treatment through GIP receptor antagonism, today announces the election of Keith Leonard as Chairman of its Board of Directors. headline: Goldman Sachs Trims Amgen (AMGN) Valuation but Sticks with Buy Rating
summary: With a net profit margin of 20.96%, Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) is included among the 10 Most Profitable Dividend Stocks to Invest In Now. On June 5, Goldman Sachs lowered its price recommendation on Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) to $389 from $425. It reiterated a Buy rating on the stock.
